title: Argentina Wines Tasting
description:
Join us on Wednesday, April 1st from 4–7 PM at Whispering Vine South Creek for a tasting that explores the bold, expressive character of Argentina’s top wine regions. From high-altitude Cabernet Sauvignon to rich, polished Malbec, this lineup showcases the intensity, structure, and elegance that define Argentina’s modern winemaking.

Tasting Fee: $25 (Buy a bottle from the tasting and your fee is refunded)

Featured Wines:

  • Viña Cobos Bramare Luján de Cuyo Malbec 2023 – 93 pts Vinous – Juicy and plush with black fruit, delicate cedar, youthful energy, and a polished finish.
  • Zolo Reserva Cabernet Sauvignon 2021 – 91 pts James Suckling, 91 pts Vinous – Rich and generous with cassis, sweet tobacco, clove, black tea, and lightly chewy tannins.
  • Tapiz Black Tears Malbec – 96 pts James Suckling, 92 pts Wine Spectator – Powerful and concentrated with blackberry, blueberry, dark chocolate, mocha, and a long, luxurious finish.
  • Zaha Cabernet Sauvignon 2018 – 91 pts Wine Spectator, Top 100 #73 – Bold and structured with blackberry, cassis, dark chocolate, and polished tannins shaped by Andes-grown fruit.

Discover the depth and intensity of Argentina’s finest reds—buy a bottle and your tasting is free.
